meta.homeTitle: Laguna Escondida — Sport Fishing & Country Restaurant in Marinilla, Antioquia
meta.homeDescription: Fish 5 species and dine by the lake. Country restaurant with Yamu, Doradas, Cachama, Red Tilapia and Nilotica in Marinilla. 45 min from Medellin.
meta.blogTitle: Blog — Laguna Escondida | Fishing, Food & Nature
meta.blogDescription: Fishing guides, fresh fish recipes and things to do in Eastern Antioquia. Learn about sport fishing and country cuisine.

hero.subheadline: Country restaurant and sport fishing in Marinilla, Antioquia. Yamu, Doradas, Cachama, Red Tilapia and Nilotica — all in one place.
hero.bgAlt: View of the sport fishing lake from the dining area at Laguna Escondida in Marinilla, Antioquia
hero.waMessage: Hi, I'd like to book a visit at Laguna Escondida

experiences.heading: What can you do at Laguna Escondida?
experiences.subtitle: Laguna Escondida is a country restaurant with a sport fishing lake located in Vereda La Primavera, Marinilla. It offers three experiences in one destination: fish, eat and celebrate.

cards.title: Fish
cards.description: Lake with 5 fish species: Yamu, Doradas, Cachama, Red Tilapia and Nile Tilapia. The widest variety in Eastern Antioquia.

cards.title: Eat
cards.description: Country restaurant overlooking the lake. Fried Yamu, Tilapia, Trout and more. Bamboo construction, authentic rustic atmosphere.

cards.title: Celebrate
cards.description: Birthdays, gender reveals and gatherings with a private kiosk. Country venue for up to 60 guests by the lake.

fishSpecies.heading: Why does Laguna Escondida have more variety than any trout farm?
fishSpecies.subtitle: While most trout farms in Eastern Antioquia only offer trout, at Laguna Escondida you can fish 5 different species. This variety makes every visit a unique experience — for anglers of all levels.

gallery.heading: What's a day like at Laguna Escondida?
gallery.subtitle: Bamboo construction, a lake surrounded by nature, and fresh dishes served with a view of the water. This is Laguna Escondida in Marinilla, Antioquia.

items.text: Excellent place, the food was delicious and the fishing was incredible. The kids didn't want to leave. We'll be back soon.
items.author: Google Maps customer

items.text: I had never fished Yamu before. It was a unique experience being able to fish something other than trout. The place is beautiful and peaceful.
items.author: Google Maps customer

items.text: We celebrated my son's birthday at the private kiosk. First-class service, delicious food and the kids fished all day.
items.author: Google Maps customer

location.heading: How to get to Laguna Escondida?
location.subtitle: Laguna Escondida is located in Vereda La Primavera, Marinilla, Antioquia. It's 45 minutes from Medellin and 15 minutes from Rionegro via the Medellin-Bogota highway.
location.mapTitle: Laguna Escondida location on Google Maps
location.fromMedellinDesc: Take the Medellin-Bogota highway. Pass the Santa Elena toll. In Marinilla, take the exit toward Vereda La Primavera. Estimated time: 45 minutes.
location.fromRionegroDesc: Straight along the road to Marinilla. Arrive in 15 minutes without traffic.
